exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your 3d printing forward
items: Research different types of 3D printers to understand FDM, SLA, and SLS technologies.
Set up your workspace with proper ventilation and a stable surface for your printer.
Download and install slicing software like Cura or PrusaSlicer on your computer.
Level your printer bed using the manual or auto-leveling process.
Load filament into your 3D printer following the manufacturer
Print your first test cube to check printer calibration and settings.
